description: A hard brittle transparent substance made by fusing sand; what reveals while protecting. 'Phielo' names what shows through—solid yet invisible, barrier yet window.
sound_symbolism: The word breathes transparent. 'Phi' /ɸi/ whispers with fragile delicacy, glass thin. The vowel 'e' opens to light. Then 'lo' looks through to the other side.
grammatical_notes: Functions as noun: 'lo phielo' (the glass). For windows, vessels, lenses. Transforms sand through fire.

pillars.art-nouveau-aesthetics: Glass as art—stained windows, flowing forms, Tiffany and Lalique's flowing designs.
pillars.solarpunk-values: Infinitely recyclable—glass melts and reforms without degradation, truly circular material.
